parameters.query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gda_scanner_log (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  run_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  total_scanners INT,
  ok_count INT,
  error_count INT,
  results JSONB,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);
INSERT INTO gda_scanner_log (run_at, total_scanners, ok_count, error_count, results)
VALUES ($1::timestamptz, $2::int, $3::int, $4::int, $5::jsonb)
